memories.text: The Zobodhi Memory System uses 4 layers: Input Awareness (what's currently sensed), Working Memory (active processing), Semantic Memory (long-term facts), and Procedural Memory (how to do things). Memories are stored with metadata including source, type, confidence, and tags.
Don prefers concise answers and operational verification — screenshots, curl checks, health endpoints
Scottish Rite website deployed at scottish-rite-jaknyfe.zocomputer.io and wildcatart.com — build from source, copy to scottish-rite-site, push git
Clarion Intelligence System installed 2026-05-21 — dual-layer memory: Clarion (structured files + rules) + zobodhi-memory (fast JSON cache)
Paperclip hosted service — verify with /api/health endpoint, Postgres connectivity is the known failure point
Kilo UI deployed at kilo-jaknyfe.zocomputer.io — React/Vite frontend calling kilo backend
Clarion memory rules: Rule 1 — load USER.md and MEMORY.md at every conversation start; Rule 2 — capture preferences + sync to zobodhi-memory
